summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of investor landing page. Core functionality working well with navigation, hero section, problem/solution sections, features tabs, business impact, demo form, and mobile responsiveness all functioning properly. Minor content rendering issues found in investor value and traction sections.

ui_bugs.issue: Scalability cards not rendering - found 0 cards when 4 expected
Milestone cards and roadmap badges not rendering - found 0 items when multiple expected

integration_issues.issue: Form validation shows success toast instead of error toast when submitting empty required fields

passed_tests: Navigation with smooth scrolling and active section highlighting
Hero section with headline, subheadline, badge, and both CTAs working
Problem section with 5 pain point cards displaying correctly
Features section with working tabs for Sales Reps, Managers, Directors
Business Impact section with 6 outcome cards
Demo form with all fields, successful mocked submission, and form reset
Footer with legal text and links
Mobile responsiveness with working mobile menu
All navigation links scroll to correct sections
Investment thesis list with 6 points in investor section
success_percentage: frontend: 85% - core functionality excellent, minor content rendering issues
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix content rendering in Investor Value section (scalability cards) and Traction section (milestone cards and roadmap badges). Also fix demo form validation to show error toast for empty required fields instead of success toast.
